skill.name: deep-search-and-insight-synthesize
skill.description: Guides systematic deep research with layered web searches, source quality checks, cross-source validation, and synthesized reports for complex topics.
skill.summary: Conducts layered research and turns multiple sources into concise, evidence-based insights.

security_audit.summary: The static findings were evaluated against SKILL.md and appear to be false positives from prose content. The file describes a research workflow and mentions writing Markdown reports, but no executable shell code, weak cryptography use, obfuscated payload, prompt injection attempt, or data exfiltration intent was found.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Write Tool Mention Flagged as External Command
low_findings.description: Verdict: FALSE_POSITIVE. SKILL.md line 74 instructs the assistant to create a Markdown document with the Write tool. It does not contain Ruby backticks, shell execution, or user-controlled command execution.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The referenced line is plain Markdown prose about creating a .md document. I found no shell command syntax or executable script context at this location.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Description Text Flagged as Weak Cryptography
low_findings.description: Verdict: FALSE_POSITIVE. SKILL.md line 3 is the skill description for deep research. It does not configure or invoke DES, MD5, SHA1, or another weak cryptographic algorithm.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The line is frontmatter text describing research behavior. There is no cryptographic API, library call, hash operation, or cipher configuration.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Entropy Heuristic on Markdown Content
low_findings.description: Verdict: FALSE_POSITIVE. SKILL.md line 1 begins normal YAML frontmatter for a Markdown skill file. The high entropy heuristic is likely caused by Chinese text and punctuation elsewhere in the document, not encoded or encrypted content.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Manual review shows a readable 165-line Markdown file. I found no binary blob, packed payload, encrypted block, or decoding instructions.

content.value_statement: Complex topics often require more than one quick search. This skill structures layered searches, validates sources, and turns findings into clear research outputs.
actual_capabilities: Plans three layers of research queries for broad, focused, and validation searches.
Compares information across multiple sources to identify agreement and conflicts.
Prioritizes authoritative, recent, and relevant sources during research.
Selects concise Markdown, detailed Markdown, or HTML report formats by task complexity.
Includes source links, key findings, trend judgments, and visual report guidance.
limitations: Requires an available web search or browsing tool to gather current information.
Does not guarantee that every source is accurate or complete.
May take more time than a single search for simple questions.
HTML and chart outputs depend on the host tool permissions and available file writing.

use_cases.title: Compare Vendor Options
use_cases.description: Research product features, pricing signals, customer sentiment, and tradeoffs across several vendors.

use_cases.title: Evaluate Technical Choices
use_cases.description: Gather evidence about frameworks, tools, or architecture options before making a selection.

use_cases.title: Track Market Trends
use_cases.description: Synthesize recent news, reports, and expert views into a structured trend briefing.

prompt_templates.title: Research a Topic
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner request for a concise briefing.
prompt_templates.prompt: Research [topic]. Use multiple reliable sources and return a concise Markdown report with key findings and source links.

prompt_templates.title: Compare Several Options
prompt_templates.prompt: Compare [option A], [option B], and [option C] for [use case]. Include strengths, weaknesses, risks, and a recommendation.

prompt_templates.title: Validate a Claim
prompt_templates.prompt: Investigate whether [claim] is accurate. Search for supporting and opposing evidence, assess source quality, and explain uncertainty.

prompt_templates.title: Build a Strategic Report
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced request for a full research deliverable.
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a deep research report on [market or technology]. Include trends, evidence, competing views, source evaluation, and practical implications.

output_examples.input: Compare three project management tools for a 50 person software team.
output_examples.output: A structured comparison with evaluation criteria, key differences, source notes, and a practical recommendation.

output_examples.input: Research current trends in AI coding assistants for enterprise teams.
output_examples.output: A trend briefing covering market direction, adoption drivers, risks, recent evidence, and cited sources.

output_examples.input: Check whether a vendor claim is supported by independent evidence.
output_examples.output: A claim validation summary with confirming evidence, conflicting evidence, source quality notes, and confidence level.

best_practices: State the research question, decision context, and required time range upfront.
Ask for source quality notes when the topic is disputed or time sensitive.
Use the detailed report mode when results need to be shared or reviewed later.
anti_patterns: Do not use this skill for questions that only need a known fact or quick lookup.
Do not treat search results as final without checking source credibility.
Do not request current research when browsing tools are unavailable.

faq.question: What does this skill do?
faq.answer: It guides deep web research, source validation, and synthesis into concise or detailed reports.

faq.question: Does it browse the web by itself?
faq.answer: No. It depends on the host assistant having web search or browsing tools available.

faq.question: Can it create charts?
faq.answer: It can guide Mermaid and QuickChart use when the output format and host tools support them.

faq.question: Is it useful for technical decisions?
faq.answer: Yes. It is designed for comparisons, evaluations, tradeoff analysis, and evidence-based recommendations.

faq.question: How many sources does it use?
faq.answer: It instructs the assistant to use layered searches and cross-check important findings across multiple sources.

faq.question: What language does the original skill prefer?
faq.answer: The source skill asks for Chinese responses, while the marketplace description is written in English.
